name: Zikkit's Tunnelpack
inspire: After an Action step, if a friendly fighter was dealt damage or slain in that step, pick one other friendly fighter. Inspire that fighter.

reactions.name: More-more Power!
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately at the start of your Action step if each friendly fighter has a Charge token.
reactions.flavorText: The Skaven of Zikkit's Tunnelpack push the limits of their creations with the twisted science of the Clans Skryre.
reactions.rulesText: Use this immediately at the start of your Action step if each friendly fighter has a Charge token. Pick a friendly fighter. Remove that fighter's Move and/or Charge tokens. After that Action step, roll an Attack dice. On a {icon:fury} or {icon:crit}, that fighter is slain.

abilities.name: Skitter
abilities.flavorText: Skaven are infamously twitchy, paranoid, aggressive and rarely around in one spot for too long.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after your Action step. Pick a friendly fighter with no Move or Charge tokens. That fighter Moves. This ability can only be used once per game.

abilities.name: Warp-charged
abilities.flavorText: The Clans Skryre craft weapons renowned for lethality and unpredictability in equal measure.
abilities.rulesText: Use this ability immediately after you pick a weapon as part of an Attack. Inflict 1 damage on the attacker. That weapon has Cleave ({icon:cleave}), Ensnare ({icon:ensnare}) and Brutal ({icon:grievous}) for that Attack. This ability can only be used once per game.

abilities.name: Kaboom!
abilities.flavorText: A rat with a bomb... simple, yet effective.
abilities.rulesText: Pick a friendly minion ({icon:minion}) with no Charge tokens to use this ability. That minion Moves. Then, roll a number of Attack dice equal to the battle round number for each fighter within 2 hexes of that minion. If the roll contains any {icon:fury}, inflict 1 damage on that fighter. If the roll contains any {icon:crit}, inflict 2 damage on that fighter instead. Then, that minion is slain.
